<?php namespace Http\Client\Promise; use Http\Client\Exception; use Http\Promise\Promise; use Psr\Http\Message\ResponseInterface; final class HttpFulfilledPromise implements Promise { /** * @var ResponseInterface */ private $response; public function __construct(ResponseInterface $response) { $this->response = $response; } public function then(?callable $onFulfilled = null, ?callable $onRejected = null) { if (null === $onFulfilled) { return $this; } try { return new self($onFulfilled($this->response)); } catch (Exception $e) { return new HttpRejectedPromise($e); } } public function getState() { return Promise::FULFILLED; } public function wait($unwrap = true) { if ($unwrap) { return $this->response; } } }
